workouts.name: Lower Body Push (40 min)
workouts.content:
Total: ~40 min · Lower body strength

Warm-Up (5 min):
• 2 min treadmill walk or light jog
• Leg swings — 10 each leg
• Hip circles — 10 each direction

The Work:
🏋️ Barbell Back Squat — 3×10
Feet shoulder-width, chest tall, sit back into your heels. Drive up through the floor.

🏋️ Romanian Deadlift (barbell or dumbbells) — 3×12
Hinge at hips, soft knees, feel the hamstring stretch. Keep the bar close.

🔗 Cable Kickbacks — 3×15 each side
Squeeze the glute at the top, controlled on the way back.

🦵 Leg Press — 3×12
Feet mid-platform, press through heels. Full range.

🔔 Kettlebell Sumo Squat — 2×15
Wide stance, toes out, drop low, squeeze glutes at the top.

🪜 Step-Ups with Dumbbells — 2×12 each leg
Full foot on the step, drive through the heel.

🩹 Theraband Clamshells — 2×20 each side
On your side, feet stacked, band above knees. Keep hips stacked.

Cool-Down (5 min):
• Hip flexor stretch — 45 sec each side
• Pigeon pose — 60 sec each side
• Quad stretch — 30 sec each side

Notes: Postpartum-safe ✅ · Warm up squats lighter · Slow RDL lowering phase · Don't skip clamshells — great for hip stability

workouts.name: Reformer — Footwork Foundation (40 min)
workouts.content:
Total: 40 min · Pilates reformer

Setup: Springs 3–4 (medium-heavy) · Headrest up · Footbar up · Supine on carriage

Warm-Up (10 min):
• Breathing + Imprint — 8 breaths
• Pelvic Tilts / Bridge Prep — 8 reps

Footwork Series (15 min):
• Toes (Pilates V) — 10 reps
• Arches — 10 reps
• Heels — 10 reps
• Wide Parallel (hip width) — 10 reps
• Single Leg — 8 each side

Main Exercise (10 min):
• Running + Pelvic Lift — 20 steps + 8 lifts

Cool Down (5 min):
• Knee Folds / Supine Hip Flexor Stretch — 4 each side
• Spinal Rotation supine — 1 min each side

Notes: Postpartum-safe ✅ · Maintain neutral spine · Reduce spring if needed

workouts.name: 45 Min Full Body
workouts.content:
Warm-Up: 5 min easy row

Block 1 — Lower Body (3 rounds, 45s on / 15s rest):
• Barbell/goblet squat
• Romanian deadlift (dumbbells)
• Glute bridge
• Reverse lunge (alternating)

Block 2 — Upper Body (3 rounds, 45s on / 15s rest):
• Cable lat pulldown
• Dumbbell shoulder press
• Cable seated row
• Dumbbell bicep curl

Block 3 — Cardio (8 min):
• 8 x 1-min treadmill intervals (30s fast / 30s recover, incline 3-5%)

Cool Down: 5 min full body stretch
